prompt: Create a realistic full-body fashion photoshoot of a young East Asian woman standing on a sandy beach at sunset, with calm ocean waves behind her, distant hills, a low orange sun near the horizon, soft pastel clouds, and a small coastal skyline on the right. She has long loose black hair blowing slightly in the breeze, a slim build, natural makeup, and a playful expression while winking; one hand is lifted behind her head and the other holds a small brown Louis Vuitton monogram handbag with leather handles and a shoulder strap. She wears an oversized off-shoulder purple T-shirt with a large white Puma logo across the chest, loose light-blue wide-leg Pepe Jeans with a visible embroidered Pepe Jeans London logo on the upper thigh, and chunky white-and-lavender Skechers sneakers with an S logo. Compose the shot vertically like a smartphone photo, eye-level to slightly low angle, full body centered, casual model pose, soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin texture, detailed fabric folds, beach sand and shells visible in the foreground, cinematic yet natural color grading. Add a small SocialSight watermark in the bottom-right corner. Avoid extra people, distorted logos, extra limbs, or unreadable brand marks.
